start.speaker: Ignorance
start.text: I am from the country of Conceit, and I keep to the good rules I know. My heart tells me I shall be welcomed at the City. Does not yours tell you the same?
start.text_zh: 我从「自负之地」来，谨守我所知道的好规矩。我的心告诉我，我在天城必蒙接纳。你的心不也这样告诉你吗？

choices.text: A heart can flatter as well as fear. I trust the Word's verdict, not my own.
choices.text_zh: 心既会惧怕，也会奉承。我信靠真道的判语，而非我自己的感觉。

choices.text: I once thought as you do. Do not rest on the gate without the King's own welcome.
choices.text_zh: 我从前也这样想。不要在没有王亲自接纳的情况下，就安心倚靠那门。

shrug.speaker: Ignorance
shrug.text: You think too darkly, pilgrim. I shall keep my own pace, and my own good hope.
shrug.text_zh: 朝圣者，你想得太灰暗了。我自走我的步调，存我自己的好指望。

choices.text: Then I pray you find true ground before the river.
choices.text_zh: 那我愿你在那河之前，寻得真实的根基。
